zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Clapp於1575年出生在英國戴文維恩 奧特利時，他的父親Richard Clapp47歲，母親Christian Pile45歲。他於1603年與Elizabeth Yonge在英國戴文維恩 奧特利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年3月14日在英國英格蘭戴文維恩 奧特利享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文哈普福德。

nameMeanings.name: Clapp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): either from Middle English clop(pe), clap(pe) ‘lump’, perhaps denoting a stocky person, or Middle English clap(pe) ‘loud noise; noisy, idle chatter’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Slovenian Klep: nickname from klep ‘sharpness of scythe or sickle’, also ‘sharpening with a hammer’.

variants.name: Klapp
meanings: German: nickname for a gossip or slanderer, from Middle High German klapf, klaff ‘prattle, malicious gossip’. Compare Clapp .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Clapp was born in 1575, in Venn Ottery, Devon, England, his father, Richard Clapp, was 47 and his mother, Christian Pile, was 45. He married Elizabeth Yonge in 1603, in Venn Ottery, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 March 1631, in Venn Ottery, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Harpford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Clapp est né en 1575, à Venn Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Clapp, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Christian Pile, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Yonge en 1603, à Venn Ottery, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1631, à Venn Ottery, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Harpford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clappが1575年にイギリスデボンベン オッテリーで生まれた時，父Richard Clappは47歳，母Christian Pileは45歳であった。1603年にイギリスデボンベン オッテリーでElizabeth Yongeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年3月14日にイギリスイギリスデボンベン オッテリーで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンハープフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Clapp(이)가 1575년 영국 데폰 벤 오터이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Clapp(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Pile(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1603년 영국 데폰 벤 오터이에서 Elizabeth Yonge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 3월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 벤 오터이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하르p퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Clapp родился в 1575 г. в местности венн оттири, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Clapp было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Pile, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Yonge в 1603 г. в местности венн оттири, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 марта 1631 г. в местности венн оттири, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности харпфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
